overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage showing a character walking through a dark forest at night with a flashlight. The character navigates around fallen logs and wooden posts, briefly interacting with a wooden post by hand, while moving toward a rocky area with a stone wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest floor with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark forest, sweeping flashlight across the ground to navigate around obstacles

scattered rocks and uneven ground on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a dark forest at night. The flashlight illuminates scattered fallen branches and a wooden post ahead. Tree trunks are visible in the distant background as the character moves steadily forward along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path alongside stone wall

events.description: environment transitions to rocky area with prominent stone wall visible on the left
character's hand reaches out and grasps the wooden post while passing by

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully around wooden posts and rocks, briefly reaching out to touch a wooden post for stability or inspection

entered.detail: tall rock face or cliff wall running along the left side of the path
large rock formation blocking part of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a rockier section of the forest with a prominent stone wall on the left. The flashlight reveals large boulders and fallen logs in the path. Around the 20-second mark, the character's hand briefly reaches out to touch the wooden post while navigating past it. The stone wall becomes closer and more detailed as the character progresses along the narrow path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that transitions from a wooded dirt path into a rugged, rocky corridor. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the night to illuminate scattered branches and distant tree trunks while moving steadily forward. As the terrain shifts, the path becomes rockier, bringing the camera closer to a prominent stone wall that emerges on the left. The movement continues past large boulders and fallen logs, with the character's hand briefly reaching out to touch a wooden post while navigating the narrow passage. The scene finally tightens as the stone wall becomes more detailed and imposing against the surrounding darkness.
